description.description: Human-readable description or context about the OCRized image.

image.description: Original image submitted for OCR processing.

ocr-text.description: Text extracted from the image by OCR.

reference.description: Reference or link related to the OCRized image artifact.

source.description: Source system or project that produced the OCR result.

description: Object describing an OCRized image, including the original image, extracted text, and contextual description.
name: ocrized-image
